requirement_topic.en: Grid Connectivity — CEA Technical Standards for Distributed Generation / BESS
requirement_topic.zh: 并网连接 — CEA分布式发电/储能系统技术标准
requirement_topic.zht: 並網連接 — CEA分散式發電/儲能系統技術標準

summary.en: In India, battery energy storage systems (BESS) connected to the electricity grid must comply with the Central Electricity Authority (CEA) Technical Standards for Connectivity of the Distributed Generation Resources Regulations 2013 (amended 2019), and the CEA (Measures relating to Safety and Electric Supply) Regulations 2010. The Ministry of Power 'Battery Energy Storage Systems: Operational and Business Model Guidelines 2022' (BESS Guidelines 2022) provides additional framework for grid-connected stationary BESS. Grid connectivity approval must be obtained from the relevant State Electricity Regulatory Commission (SERC) and the distribution/transmission licensee. Draft CEA (Technical Standards for Connectivity to the Grid and Grid Code) Regulations are under development and will further govern BESS grid integration. Power conversion equipment must be compatible with Indian grid parameters (50 Hz, IS/IEC standards for inverters).
summary.zh: 在印度，并入电网的电池储能系统（BESS）须符合中央电力局（CEA）《分布式发电资源并网技术标准条例2013》（2019年修订）及《CEA（电力安全与供应相关措施）条例2010》。电力部《电池储能系统：运营与商业模式指南2022》（BESS指南2022）为并网固定式BESS提供了额外的管理框架。并网批准须向相关州电力监管委员会（SERC）及配电/输电许可持有人申请。CEA《电网并网技术标准及电网规程》草案条例正在制定中，将进一步规范BESS并网整合。功率变换设备须与印度电网参数兼容（50赫兹，适用于逆变器的IS/IEC标准）。
summary.zht: 在印度，並入電網的電池儲能系統（BESS）須符合中央電力局（CEA）《分散式發電資源並網技術標準條例2013》（2019年修訂）及《CEA（電力安全與供應相關措施）條例2010》。電力部《電池儲能系統：運營與商業模式指引2022》（BESS指引2022）為並網固定式BESS提供了額外的管理框架。並網批准須向相關州電力監管委員會（SERC）及配電/輸電許可持有人申請。CEA《電網並網技術標準及電網規程》草案條例正在制定中，將進一步規範BESS並網整合。功率轉換設備須與印度電網參數兼容（50赫茲，適用於逆變器的IS/IEC標準）。

standards_or_laws: CEA (Technical Standards for Connectivity of the Distributed Generation Resources) Regulations 2013 (amended 2019)
CEA (Measures relating to Safety and Electric Supply) Regulations 2010
Ministry of Power — Battery Energy Storage Systems: Operational and Business Model Guidelines 2022
Draft CEA (Technical Standards for Connectivity to the Grid and Grid Code) Regulations (under development as of 2026)

summary.en: China's grid-connected BESS must comply with GB/T 36558-2022 (General technical requirements for electrochemical energy storage systems connected to the power grid) and GB/T 34131-2017 (Battery management system for electric energy storage system). Grid connection in China is governed by State Grid Corporation (SGCC) Q/GDW standards and NB/T standards issued by the National Energy Administration. Chinese grid-connection approval documentation and SGCC interface standards are not accepted by Indian CEA or SERCs as substitutes for Indian grid connectivity approval.
summary.zh: 中国并网BESS须符合GB/T 36558-2022（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）及GB/T 34131-2017（电力储能用电池管理系统）。中国并网受国家电网公司（SGCC）Q/GDW标准及国家能源局NB/T标准规范。中国并网审批文件及SGCC接口标准不被印度CEA或SERC接受为印度并网许可的替代依据。
summary.zht: 中國並網BESS須符合GB/T 36558-2022（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）及GB/T 34131-2017（電力儲能用電池管理系統）。中國並網受國家電網公司（SGCC）Q/GDW標準及國家能源局NB/T標準規範。中國並網審批文件及SGCC接口標準不被印度CEA或SERC接受為印度並網許可的替代依據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2022 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件（General technical requirements for electrochemical energy storage systems)
GB/T 34131-2017 — 电力储能用电池管理系统（Battery management system for electric energy storage system)

gap.en: India requires separate grid-connectivity approval from the relevant SERC and distribution licensee under CEA Regulations 2013 (amended 2019) and the BESS Guidelines 2022. Chinese grid-connection certifications, SGCC approvals, and GB/T 36558 documentation are not recognised by Indian regulators. BESS power conversion systems must meet Indian 50 Hz grid parameters, and inverters/PCS must comply with applicable IS/IEC standards for grid-interactive inverters. CEA grid code requirements are evolving; manufacturers should verify current SERC-specific technical requirements before installation.
gap.zh: 印度要求依据CEA条例2013（2019年修订）及BESS指南2022，向相关SERC和配电许可持有人单独取得并网许可。中国并网认证、SGCC批准及GB/T 36558文件不被印度监管机构认可。BESS功率变换系统须满足印度50赫兹电网参数，逆变器/PCS须符合并网型逆变器适用的IS/IEC标准。CEA电网规程要求持续演变，制造商在安装前应核验当前各州监管委员会的具体技术要求。
gap.zht: 印度要求依據CEA條例2013（2019年修訂）及BESS指引2022，向相關SERC和配電許可持有人單獨取得並網許可。中國並網認證、SGCC批准及GB/T 36558文件不被印度監管機構認可。BESS功率轉換系統須滿足印度50赫茲電網參數，逆變器/PCS須符合並網型逆變器適用的IS/IEC標準。CEA電網規程要求持續演變，製造商在安裝前應核驗當前各州監管委員會的具體技術要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (CEA Regulations 2013/2019 and SERC approval required for grid-connected BESS in India)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic CN market (SGCC Q/GDW standards and NEA regulations for grid-connected BESS)

source.publisher: Central Electricity Authority (CEA), Government of India

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese BESS intended for grid connection in India must obtain CEA-compliant grid-connectivity approval from the relevant SERC and distribution licensee. Chinese grid-connection documentation and certifications do not satisfy Indian CEA regulatory requirements. Power conversion systems must meet Indian 50 Hz grid parameters and applicable IS/IEC inverter standards.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 拟在印度并网运行的中国BESS须向相关SERC和配电许可持有人取得符合CEA要求的并网许可。中国并网文件和认证不满足印度CEA监管要求。功率变换系统须满足印度50赫兹电网参数及适用的IS/IEC逆变器标准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 擬在印度並網運行的中國BESS須向相關SERC和配電許可持有人取得符合CEA要求的並網許可。中國並網文件和認證不滿足印度CEA監管要求。功率轉換系統須滿足印度50赫茲電網參數及適用的IS/IEC逆變器標準。
